description:
This is the first problem of another set of 4x4 problems. Please find the best result for black! A one point loss will be better (and therefore "RIGHT") than a two point loss, a two point win better than a one point win. 
(japanese rules)
sgf:

RU[Japanese]SZ[4]KM[0.00]
PW[WeiÃƒÅ¸]PB[Schwarz]AW[aa][cb][db][ac][bc][dc][ad][bd][dd]AB[ab][bb][cc]C[Black to play - what's the best he can do?!]
(;B[ba]CR[ba]
;W[cd]CR[cd]
;B[ca]CR[ca]C[This jigo is best for black! B C1 instead of B B4 would have been a mistake. RIGHT])
(;B[cd]CR[cd]
;W[bc]CR[bc]

;W[bd]CR[bd]

;W[ac]CR[ac]C[White has two eyes])))
